text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while we're training hard for the Japan
Cup, Matikanetannhauser receives a letter from
the bespectacled reporter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the letter, he tells her that she's inspired him
many times. He also writes that
Matikanetannhauser wouldn't be as inspiring if
she was naturally talented at racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
He expresses his thanks to her for becoming his
"star." Reading that, Matikanetannhauser recalls
Director Akikawa's words: "It's because you're
you that they're so inspired!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She finally understands what the director means.
If someone like her can be someone's "star," then
she wants to be one too, for as many people as
possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her new dream fills her with motivation. She
declares she'll be the star of the Japan Cup at a
press conference, setting expectations for her at
an all-time high!
